articles.excerpt: We're looking to build a changeling Commander deck, so let's fill it up with all of the best Lords printed in Magic.

articles.value: How To Play Angels In Commander
articles.excerpt: Do you want to smite your opponents? Are you filled with righteous zeal, looking for ways to invoke heavenly wrath? Play an Angel deck!
Bennie Smith gives us a Grim(grin) outlook on three unique Innistrad Remastered brews!

articles.value: Recross the Paths - Build an Angel Deck with Saskia the Unyielding
